name: antigravity-quota-tracker
description: Captures Antigravity Claude/GPT and Gemini quota readings and syncs them to your quota dashboard.

antigravityQuotaTracker.dashboardUrl.description: Base URL of your quota dashboard (must expose POST /api/readings).

antigravityQuotaTracker.apiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the dashboard sync endpoint.

antigravityQuotaTracker.accountIdentifie.description: Label for the currently signed-in account on this IDE window. Set one per machine/profile if auto-detection can't read it.

antigravityQuotaTracker.captureIntervalM.description: How often to capture a reading while the IDE is open, in minutes.
